timeline_adverse.title: AtkinsRealis, Two Former Executives Hit With Class Action Lawsuit Over Alleged Disclosure Failures -- Update - MarketWatch
timeline_adverse.summary: Class action lawsuit alleging AtkinsRealis (formerly SNC-Lavalin) and two former executives misled investors about business problems including a $346M loss on a Chilean mining contract and collapse of Saudi Arabia business prospects in 2018-2019.

timeline_adverse.title: AtkinsRéalis | The Canadian Encyclopedia
timeline_adverse.summary: SNC-Lavalin pleaded guilty to fraud in 2019 in connection with past activity in Libya involving payments to associates of dictator Muammar Gaddafi; RCMP charged former executives with fraud and bribing foreign officials.

timeline_adverse.title: Former SNC-Lavalin exec sentenced to prison in bridge bribery case
timeline_adverse.summary: Former SNC-Lavalin executive sentenced to prison in bridge bribery case; company agreed in 2022 to pay Quebec nearly $30 million via deferred prosecution agreement to settle criminal bribery charges from Jacques Cartier Bridge work.

timeline_adverse.title: AtkinsRealis Hit With Class Action Lawsuit Over Alleged Disclosure Failures - MarketWatch
timeline_adverse.summary: Class action lawsuit alleging SNC-Lavalin failed to disclose a $346M loss on Chilean mining contract and Saudi Arabia business collapse until January-February 2019, causing $2.8B drop in market value.

news.summary: Ethisphere grants AtkinsRealis Compliance Leader Verification for 2025-2027 after rigorous review of ethics and compliance program, affirming world-class integrity standards.

briefing_memo: AtkinsRealis has received federal funding, though the total amount is not specified in available records. The company pleaded guilty to fraud in 2019 related to payments to associates of Libyan dictator Muammar Gaddafi, and in 2022 paid Quebec nearly $30 million via deferred prosecution agreement to settle criminal bribery charges stemming from 1997-2004 Jacques Cartier Bridge work. The company has since undergone substantial remediation: World Bank sanctions were lifted early in 2021, board and leadership were changed, and AtkinsRealis earned Compliance Leader Verification from Ethisphere Institute in 2025 and recognition as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies. Given the completed settlements, leadership renewal, and recent third-party integrity certifications, federal contracting may proceed with standard due diligence and enhanced monitoring protocols for high-value engagements.

actions.title: Review historical integrity incidents and verify ongoing compliance framework
actions.rationale: Organization shows one CRITICAL and multiple HIGH severity news items including a 2022 executive prison sentence for bribery, but has documented substantial remediation including Ethisphere World's Most Ethical Companies recognition (2026), Compliance Leader Verification (2025), and a published integrity journey framework (2022).

actions.title: Conduct enhanced due diligence on governance and anti-corruption controls for future contracts
actions.rationale: Historic criminal conduct by former executives warrants verification that current leadership and compliance systems are distinct from the legacy environment that produced criminal behavior, despite strong remediation signals.
